title: An Act relative to the training, certification, and recognition of constables and civil deputy sheriffs

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Turco of Winthrop, a petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Jeffrey Rosario Turco relative to the training, certification, and recognition of constables and civil deputy sheriffs.  Public Safety and Homeland Security.
